endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/microsoft.alertsManagement/smartDetectorAlertRules
endpoints.description: List all the existing Smart Detector alert rules within the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.alertsManagement/smartDetectorAlertRules
endpoints.description: List all the existing Smart Detector alert rules within the subscription and resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.alertsManagement/smartDetectorAlertRules/{alertRuleName}
endpoints.description: Get a specific Smart Detector alert rule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ALERTRULENAME}} with a real alertrulename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.alertsManagement/smartDetectorAlertRules/{alertRuleName}
endpoints.description: Create or update a Smart Detector alert rule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ALERTRULENAME}} with a real alertrulename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.alertsManagement/smartDetectorAlertRules/{alertRuleName}
endpoints.description: Delete an existing Smart Detector alert rule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ALERTRULENAME}} with a real alertrulename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
